title: Senior Financial Analyst - Grant Thornton India - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Grant Thornton India - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Grant Thornton India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Varanasi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Grant Thornton India:
Grant Thornton India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Grant Thornton India!
